query: OpenAI Sora web app experiences official discontinuation date 2026

{"query":"OpenAI Sora web app experiences official discontinuation date 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1551,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"When will Sora be discontinued? The Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026. The Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026."},"results":[{"url":"https://futurumgroup.com/insights/openai-sora-discontinuation-what-the-end-of-a-platform-means-for-enterprise-ai-strategy/","title":"2026 AI Platform Shifts: Sora Impact","content":"Apr 12, 2026 — OpenAI will discontinue the Sora web and app experiences on April 26, 2026, with the Sora API following on September 24, 2026 [1].
According to Futurum Group's 1H 2026 AI Platforms Decision Maker Survey (n=838), 67% of organizations already run GenAI models in production, but talent scarcity and integration complexity remain top challenges.
According to Futurum Group's 1H 2026 AI Platforms Decision Maker Survey (n=838), 61% of organizations cite OpenAI GPT as their primary GenAI platform, making any disruption to OpenAI services a material risk for a majority of adopters.
The risk of abrupt shutdowns is now a strategic factor in 2026 AI platform selection."},{"url":"https://www.glbgpt.com/hub/openai-sora-2-availability-in-the-uk-when-will-it-launch-and-how-to-access-it-early/","title":"Sora 2 in the UK (2026): Official Access Ended","content":"That is why pages about when Sora 2 will be available should now be read with a date check.
“When will Sora 2 launch in the UK?” — The consumer Sora app and web experience have already been discontinued. — “What can UK users use after Sora access ended?”
“Sora API is fully canceled already” — OpenAI gives a specific future API shutdown date: September 24, 2026. — Say the API is deprecated and scheduled to shut down.
OpenAI says those experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026, so UK users should not wait for a normal app launch or invite-code rollout.
UK users should compare AI video alternatives such as Veo, Kling, Wan, Seedance, and other platform-provided video models.
GlobalGPT is not the official Sora app."},{"url":"https://blog.laozhang.ai/en/posts/sora-2-api-discontinued","title":"Is OpenAI Shutting Down Sora? What The Official Docs Actually Say In March 2026 | LaoZhang AI Blog","content":"At the same time, OpenAI's current help pages still present Sora 2 as the default video experience on sora.com and in the Sora apps, and OpenAI's current developer docs still list Sora-2, Sora-2-Pro, and the /v1/videos API.
Current official OpenAI help and developer pages do not read that way.
Sora 1 web in the U.S. — Removed on March 13, 2026 — If you still care about legacy work, export what matters, but do not treat Sora 1 as the current product path
It does not say that every part of Sora is gone.
It says that Sora 1 web was removed for all users in the United States on March 13, 2026, and that Sora 2 became the default video generation experience at sora.com and in the Sora apps.
The same page says ChatGPT Pro and API users will gain access to Sora 2 Pro as rollout progresses.
The official change here is real.
What I could not verify was a fresh official OpenAI page that cleanly reconciles those two stories in one place.
The safest verified answer on March 28, 2026 is no, not completely.
That is the clearest official date in the current status story."}]}
